name: cpig-booleans-01-intersection-sphere-sphere
description: Phase D4 boolean audit (B0). Intersection of two overlapping tape spheres -- expect ONLY the lens-shaped overlap region. Sequence: _CPigSphere 0,0,0 10 + _CPigSphere 15,0,0 10 (overlap roughly 5 units wide at x=7.5) -> _SelAll _CPigIntersection. Failure modes: empty viewport (Intersection failed or AABB scoping killed the result), full union (sign inverted), one of the source spheres (Intersection became a no-op).

setup.vlmDescription: A 3D ray-marched signed-distance surface showing the lens-shaped intersection of two overlapping spheres -- a single thin almond/lens shape, NOT a full peanut, NOT one whole sphere, NOT a blank viewport.

checkpoints.name: cpig-booleans-intersection-sphere-sphere
checkpoints.description: Intersection(sphere(0,0,0;r=10), sphere(15,0,0;r=10)) -- a thin almond/lens centered around x=7.5.
